implementation_summary.summary: CP00-688 closes the RP22 External Integrations I P08 type/shape tail, primary implementation, and secondary workflow bridge over 40 planned units from RP22.P08.M02.S15 through RP22.P08.M04.S12 while keeping evidence, workflow, fixture, permission, audit, review, Hermes, persistence, and command runtimes closed.

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-688 RP22.P08.M02.S15-RP22.P08.M04.S12 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
